channel.title: nodejs on Husnaram
channel.description: Recent content in nodejs on Husnaram

item.title: Give Authenticated User Access According to Their Own Resource in Nestjs
item.description: When user registered and then wanted to update their user resource (email, fullname, etc). Naturally they access their resource. Based on that, in Nestjs i create guard for user resources authorization. Before authorization, you must build your authentication. In my case i use JWT and Local passport strategy from official documentaion of Nestjs. . ├── app.module.ts ├── main.ts ├── auth │ ├── auth.controller.ts │ ├── auth.module.ts │ ├── auth.service.spec.ts │ ├── auth.
